Auth.loginDescription: Enter your email below to login to your account
Auth.resetPasswordDescription: Type in your email and we'll send you a link to reset your password
Auth.resetEmailMessage: If you registered using your email and password, you will receive a password reset email.
Auth.newPasswordDescription: Please enter your new password below.
Auth.signUpSuccessMessage: You've successfully signed up. Please check your email to confirm your account before signing in.

HomePage.title: Take control of your money
HomePage.description: Track every expense, monitor your income, and understand where your money goes. Simple budgeting that helps you save more and spend smarter.
HomePage.featuresTitle: Everything you need to manage your finances
HomePage.boostDescription: Join thousands of users who finally understand their spending habits. Create your free account in seconds and take the first step toward financial clarity.
HomePage.alreadyHaveAccount: Already have an account? Log in

Features.expenseTrackingDesc: Log your daily expenses in seconds. Categorize transactions across 40+ categories like groceries, rent, travel, and more.
Features.smartAnalyticsDesc: Visualize your spending patterns with interactive charts. See daily, monthly, and category breakdowns at a glance.
Features.multiCurrencyDesc: Track expenses in EUR, USD, and other currencies. Perfect for travelers and expats managing money across borders.
Features.secureDataDesc: Your financial data is encrypted and stored securely. We never share your information with third parties.

EmptyState.title: Start tracking your money
EmptyState.description: Add your first transaction below and see your spending come to life with charts, categories, and monthly insights.
EmptyState.step1Desc: Fill in the form manually, upload a receipt photo, or just describe your expense in text — choose whatever is easiest.
EmptyState.step2Desc: Hit save and give us a moment to process your transaction. Image and text entries are auto-categorized — manual ones use the category you pick.
EmptyState.step3Desc: Come back and explore your dashboard — see charts, category breakdowns, monthly totals, and a full history of all your transactions.
EmptyState.formDescription: Upload a receipt, describe it in words, or fill in the form manually.

NavMain.drawerDescription: Upload your receipts or describe expenses in your own words.
